reasoning: According to recent queries from August 2025, OpenAI officially released their flagship next-generation model, GPT-5, on August 7, 2025, along with mentions of an intermediate reasoning model, o3. Upon release, GPT-5 topped the LMsys Chatbot Arena leaderboard. Competitors have also recently deployed their major updates (e.g., Anthropic's Claude 4.1 Opus and xAI's Grok-4 in July/August 2025), which suggests the major players have exhausted their near-term major generational leaps. Considering the typical lifespan of a flagship OpenAI model at the top of the leaderboard (GPT-4 lasted roughly a year before being temporarily dethroned), and given that December 31 is only 4.5 months away, it is highly probable OpenAI retains the #1 position. Furthermore, OpenAI has a track record of actively releasing fine-tuned checkpoints to reclaim the lead if they temporarily fall behind (as seen with GPT-4 turbo and GPT-4o in mid-2024). The Polymarket baseline of 0.36 was recorded on August 7 (the very day of GPT-5's release), meaning it likely predates the full market update regarding the model's arrival and its arena performance. Accordingly, I assess a strong ~72% chance that an OpenAI model will hold the top rank on December 31.
